title: Report UID and GID of volumes under "Options" section in inspection
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

Currently in `podman volume inspect my_vol` command `UID` and `GID` are reported in root of inspection. Because they are set with `--opt o=uid=1000,gid=1000` it might be better to report them under `Options` section in inspection info.
What do you think?


**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1.
```
$ podman volume create testvol --opt o=uid=1001,gid=1001
testvol
$ podman volume inspect testvol 
[
    {
        "Name": "testvol",
        "Driver": "local",
        "Mountpoint": "/home/user/.local/share/containers/storage/volumes/testvol/_data",
        "CreatedAt": "2020-12-20T20:12:29.969298461+02:00",
        "Labels": {},
        "Scope": "local",
        "Options": {},
        "UID": 1001,
        "GID": 1001,
        "Anonymous": false
    }
]
```


**Describe the results you received:**

`UID` and `GID` are reported in root of inspection.

**Describe the results you expected:**
`UID` and `GID` are reported in inspection under `Options`.
```
[
    {
        "Name": "testvol",
        "Driver": "local",
        "Mountpoint": "/home/user/.local/share/containers/storage/volumes/testvol/_data",
        "CreatedAt": "2020-12-20T20:12:29.969298461+02:00",
        "Labels": {},
        "Scope": "local",
        "Options": {
            "UID": 1001,
            "GID": 1001,
        },
        "Anonymous": false
    }
]
```

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      3.0.0-dev
API Version:  3.0.0
Go Version:   go1.15.6
Git Commit:   5c6b5ef34905f40562b518799c35be8d06694e65
Built:        Sun Dec 20 14:48:23 2020
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64

```

Yes

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

Discovered during idempotency bug investigation in https://github.com/containers/ansible-podman-collections/issues/150
